titleStmt.title: SII 10.505: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 505. (A.R. No. 585 of 1909.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF PŌLĒRAMMA, MĀCHERLA, PALNĀD TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT. Ś. 12[3]5. (Pramādīcha)

summary.p: Damaged. Refers to provision made for worship and naivēdyam in the temple of goddess Gaṅgā-Paramēśvari of Mahādēvichaṟla, by Dēviri-Nāyaka who was the governor of the place and son of Māchaya-Nāyaka who had the biruda of establisher of the kingdom of the Kākatīyas (Kāketarājyasthāpanāchārya).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍa
lēśvara kākatiyyapratāparudradēvamahā
rājulu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdaṁbulaṁ bṛdhvi rā
jyamu sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu tatprasādōpajī
vu laina svāmidrōharagaṁḍḍa Iṁmmaḍini
śśaṁkkavīra kaliyugavīrabhadra javanikatrinētra
kāketarājyasthāpanācā¨ryyu laina svasti śrīma
tu mācayanāyiniṁgāri koḍkulu dēviri
nāyiniṁgāru mahādēvicaṟlasthalaṁ pāliṁ
pucānu tamakuṁ buṇyamugānu svasti śrī
śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1235 Agu nēṁṭi pramā dinaṁ
vatsara caitra śu 11 śu . mahādēvicaṟlaAbhyu daya
ṁgānu mahādēvicaṟla gaṁgāparamēśva
rkitrisaṁdhiUpahāraṁ biyyaṁ nityamāce
ṟlapāṭimāneḍu pesalu nityatavve
Ākūralaku daṁ¨rmma
paḍivi Āśēvaṁtipuvvulu nitya 300
lekkhaṁ yēṁṭēṁṭikini māḍa Īkramānanērā
manāthadēvaraku trisaṁdhiUpahāraṁ biyya
pesalu tavveṁḍu neI Arasōleḍu kū
ralakuṁ visāmu Āśēvaṁtipu
ṣpālu nitya 150 lekkhanu yēṁḍādikinidaṁṇa
Ādi gaṁgāpa
ramēśvariki trisaṁdhi Upahāraṁ
biyyamunu
taṁḍukūralaku daṁmmabaḍivīsā
mu śēvaṁttipuṣpālu lekkha yēṁ
ṭēṁṭiki raṇamu Īkramāna
selavu Iccuvāru
Īdha¨rmmamu yevvaru tappinaḍa
cinānu gaṁgakaṟuta gavi
leṁ boḍicinadōṣāna bōvu
vāru
Īkramāna sthānālu 3 kini Ācaṁdrā
¨rkkasthāIgānu dārapōsi vrittigānu I
stimi . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēta vasuṁddharāṁ . śvānayōniśa
tvā viṣṭhāyā jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 10.505 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
